headline: Coffee Dose Scales from 88 Square Feet to an Eight-Figure Brand Supported by Square
summary: DISTRIBUTED-WORKFORCE/OAKLAND, Calif., June 11, 2026--Square today announced that Coffee Dose, a specialty coffee brand and dining destination founded in 2018 by Jeni and Oscar Castro, is further expanding with Square as its unified commerce platform. Coffee Dose operates four locations across Southern California and is opening two additional concepts this year: Coffee Dose Brunch Club in Encinitas in June 2026, and a 3,600-square-foot flagship in Palm Springs in the fall. headline: Does Square’s Baker St Cafe Case Study Reveal a Deeper Edge in Unified Commerce for Block (SQ)?
summary: In early June 2026, Square, Inc. highlighted how Baker St Cafe in McMinnville uses its unified commerce tools, Cash App Neighborhoods program, and automated marketing campaigns to manage more than 5,700 monthly transactions and deepen customer loyalty. This case study underlines how Square’s integrated hardware, software, and data tools can help smaller merchants improve menu decisions, reduce waste, and rely less on higher-fee third-party platforms. With Block also reporting strong Q1...
